Theta-Space member controls.

SETTINGS

Choose a settings area

Settings stay card-first. Sensitive areas route through a fresh secure-area prompt; My Pics does not.

SEARCH SETTINGS

SETTINGS AREAS

Choose an area
Profile > Edit Profile
Profile

Edit display name, bio, avatar, banner, location, and visibility.

Profile > My Pics
Pics

Open your photo gallery without the secure settings wall.

Profile > My Scientology
Profile

Manage Scientology-specific classification, org, training, processing, and privacy.

Profile > My Resume
Profile

Build a printable professional resume with optional My Scientology summary.

Security > Blocked Users
secure

Manage blocked users and account protection rules.

Rules > Notification Dings
secure

Tune notification ding
